name: OfflineDownloader
maintenance_message: 此项目完全免费项目地址：https://github.com/zzgood-cmd/OfflineDownloader，感谢你的使用。

zh: 修复维护阻断开启后刷新页面偶尔可继续使用的问题。
维护阻断现在会保存本地锁定状态，远程配置临时读取失败时也不会放行业务入口。
en: Fixed an issue where the site could occasionally remain usable after refreshing while maintenance blocking was enabled.
Maintenance blocking now stores a local lock state so business routes remain blocked even if the remote config is temporarily unavailable.
